alyx.name: Alyx
alyx.description: Thanks to its big ears, the Alyx has excellent hearing and balance.

alleaux.name: Alleaux
alleaux.description: The evolved form of Alyx bares its teeth and lets its hair run wild. Its Leo spirit burns fiercer than ever.

beefee.name: Beefee
beefee.description: Beefees look like adorable baby cows, but they aren't afraid to stomp their foes.

toro.name: Toro
toro.description: Toro is the only Bull to ever win a Spanish Bull Fight and is a bovine rights activist.

dinho.name: Dinho
dinho.description: Dinho has an amazing ability to deliver precise kicks, helping it in sports.

ronal.name: Ronal
ronal.description: Evolving from the small, playful Dinho, Ronal trades in quickness for sheer power.

barnetta.name: Barnetta
barnetta.description: Barnettas don't talk a lot, but they don't need to. They're amazing at everything.

clovey.name: Clovey
clovey.description: Cloveys embody the saying 'good things come in small packages' and are said to bring luck.

coldbear.name: Coldbear
coldbear.description: Coldbear sleeps during the day and hunts at night, using its icy breath to freeze prey.

crabao.name: Crabao
crabao.description: Crabao has a shell as hard as metal, making it a formidable defensive monster.

edgar.name: Edgar
edgar.description: Not the least obeisance made he; not a minute stopped or stayed he. A master of shadows.

goatsabee.name: Goatsabee
goatsabee.description: Wasabees have a hard time sitting down, so when they evolve they get proper legs.

horus.name: Horus
horus.description: A legendary bird that commands the skies with its massive wingspan.

lambo.name: Lambo
lambo.description: Lambos have a sassy little attitude and will try to ram anything that moves.

lepus.name: Lepus
lepus.description: A magical version of the rabbit, Lepus use their flowing head-wings to raid gardens.

munninn.name: Munninn
munninn.description: Munninns say that the raven once stole the sun, but they just use that as an excuse for bad behavior.

nar.name: Nar
nar.description: The Nar is every bit as dangerous as it looks, ruling the deep ocean.

olerk.name: Olerk
olerk.description: The evolution of the Vuvu, Olerk continues to hide behind a mask-- but what it hides is even more hideous.

thorn.name: Thorn
thorn.description: Thorn fights like a mad berserker, often rushing headlong into battle to destroy its opponents.

vuvu.name: Vuvu
vuvu.description: Vuvus have a passion for mortuary rituals and can always be found wearing some sort of death mask.

wasabee.name: Wasabee
wasabee.description: The Wasabee has a poisonous sting and a short temper.

weeplet.name: Weeplet
weeplet.description: Weeplets are squishy, gelatinous creatures that cry constantly.

willo.name: Willo
willo.description: When night falls, Willos float through the marshes, leading travelers astray.

smok.name: Smok
smok.description: Smok belches thick black smoke from its chimney-like horns to confuse enemies.

ozake.name: Ozake
ozake.description: Ozake's smoke has thickened into a roiling storm of fire. Few dare challenge its wrath.

nomy.name: Nomy
nomy.description: Nomy looks harmless with its bright colours, but a single touch of its fur causes nasty burns.

rumbeard.name: Rumbeard
rumbeard.description: A fearsome pirate whose beard crackles with eternal flame. Never loses a game of cards.

eefree.name: Eefree
eefree.description: Once summoned from a lamp, Eefree now roams free — granting no wishes but burning everything in sight.

tenpac.name: Tenpac
tenpac.description: Tenpac breathes liquid fire and is known for its surprisingly smooth moves in battle.

hakka.name: Hakka
hakka.description: A blazing bird of prey whose feathers burn like coals. It screams before every strike.

pwee.name: Pwee
pwee.description: Pwee spouts water through a blowhole on its head and is always in a cheerful mood.

munyu.name: Munyu
munyu.description: Munyu grew into a chubby, lovable sea creature. Its big eyes can spot prey 50 meters deep.

jor.name: Jor
jor.description: The great serpent that encircles the world. Jor sleeps for centuries, but its waking causes floods.

ella.name: Ella
ella.description: Ella is elegant and graceful underwater, spinning in spirals to disorient opponents.

pulpo.name: Pulpo
pulpo.description: Pulpo's eight arms work independently, letting it attack and defend simultaneously.

dumboocto.name: Dumboocto
dumboocto.description: Its giant ears help it glide through deep water. Despite its size, it is surprisingly gentle.

turtlenie.name: Turtlenie
turtlenie.description: Its thick shell deflects almost any attack. Turtlenie outlasted the dinosaurs and plans to outlast everything else.

leviathan.name: Leviathan
leviathan.description: A sea monster older than time. One flick of the Leviathan's tail can sink entire fleets.

leif.name: Leif
leif.description: Leif sleeps curled under fallen leaves and wakes only when a battle is nearby.

cloyd.name: Cloyd
cloyd.description: Cloyd thrives in deep forests and can make plants grow at an alarming rate with a single touch.

yara.name: Yara
yara.description: Yara is a guardian spirit of the jungle who punishes those who harm its trees.

pudgy.name: Pudgy
pudgy.description: Pudgy is a round, squishy creature that rolls into foes at surprising speed.

meh.name: Meh
meh.description: Meh is perpetually unimpressed. It rolls its eyes before every attack.

stego.name: Stego
stego.description: Stego's spiked back plates can pierce steel. Despite being ancient, it learns tricks quickly.

juggernaut.name: Juggernaut
juggernaut.description: Nothing stops the Juggernaut. It charges through mountains and barely notices.

bock.name: Bock
bock.description: Bock loves to headbutt everything it sees. Boulders, trees, other mogas — nothing is safe.

spike.name: Spike
spike.description: Spike can launch its spines like missiles. It regrows them within hours.

chuuchilla.name: Chuuchilla
chuuchilla.description: This tiny creature vibrates at high frequency, shaking the ground with powerful tremors.

chuuzilla.name: Chuuzilla
chuuzilla.description: Chuuzilla towers over all other mogas. Its roar alone causes 4.0 magnitude earthquakes.

sheriff.name: Sheriff
sheriff.description: Sheriff keeps order with iron claws. It has never missed a target — not once.

messi.name: Messi
messi.description: Messi is the greatest earth moga alive. Its footwork is unmatched, and it knows it.

trolo.name: Trolo
trolo.description: Trolo lives under bridges and will challenge anyone who crosses. It never backs down.

brolo.name: Brolo
brolo.description: Brolo is a legend among trolls. Mountains crack when it flexes.

electrotter.name: Electrotter
electrotter.description: Electrotter discharges electricity constantly, leaving scorch marks wherever it trots.

ac.name: AC
ac.description: A robot moga powered by an internal thunderstorm. Its systems are always running at full voltage.

staryak.name: Staryak
staryak.description: Staryak wandered down from the electric highlands. Its fur crackles with static night and day.

twister.name: Twister
twister.description: A living whirlwind. Twister can spin at 200mph and enjoys picking up small objects.

winja.name: Winja
winja.description: A wind ninja who strikes faster than the eye can follow. Its shuriken are made of compressed air.

anini.name: Anini
anini.description: Anini rides thermal currents for weeks without landing. It sleeps while soaring.

colibri.name: Colibri
colibri.description: Colibri is the fastest moga alive. It flaps its wings 80 times per second.

owlreed.name: Owlreed
owlreed.description: Owlreed hunts in complete silence. Its feathers muffle all sound — even the wind.

booly.name: Booly
booly.description: Booly uses its frozen fists to punch holes in icebergs for fun. It gets bored easily.

woolf.name: Woolf
woolf.description: Woolf howls and the temperature drops 20 degrees. It leads its pack across frozen tundra.

yugel.name: Yugel
yugel.description: Yugel lives in the highest peaks where nothing else survives. It considers cold weather warm.

kysebok.name: Kysebok
kysebok.description: A legendary Scandinavian ice beast with horns that can freeze anything they touch.

friedrich.name: Friedrich
friedrich.description: Friedrich keeps meticulous records of every battle. It has never been surprised.

zuki.name: Zuki
zuki.description: Zuki forms a shell of ice around itself when threatened. It thaws out when danger passes.

metalear.name: Metalear
metalear.description: Metalear's ears are solid titanium and pick up radio signals from across the planet.

prototype_zero.name: Prototype Zero
prototype_zero.description: The first and most powerful mechanical moga ever created. Its origin is classified.

peascorp.name: Peascorp
peascorp.description: Peascorp disguises itself as a harmless plant before striking with its venomous stinger.

spwinder.name: Spwinder
spwinder.description: Spwinder spins webs of pure venom. Prey dissolves within seconds of contact.

paul.name: Paul
paul.description: Paul has never made a wrong prediction. It chooses battles with absolute certainty.

anee.name: Anee
anee.description: Anee carries a tiny lantern that never goes out, lighting the way for lost travelers.

yoake.name: Yoake
yoake.description: Yoake embodies the moment just before dawn. Its light can pierce even the darkest shadow.

starpops.name: Starpops
starpops.description: Starpops shoots stars from its fingertips and loves to perform for audiences.

peafyx.name: Peafyx
peafyx.description: Peafyx rises from flame every century. Each rebirth makes it more radiant than before.

boogaleef.name: Boogaleef
boogaleef.description: Boogaleef hides under beds waiting for its victims. It is always smiling.

beaster.name: Beaster
beaster.description: Beaster has grown enormous and wears an unsettling holiday mask. No one has ever seen what's underneath.

meano.name: Meano
meano.description: Meano exists solely to make others miserable. It has mastered the dark art of the mean face.

gocon.name: Gocon
gocon.description: Gocon surrounds itself in a dark cocoon and emerges transformed after every battle.

shadowstar.name: Shadowstar
shadowstar.description: Shadowstar is born from fallen constellations. It leaves dark streaks across the night sky.

shadowstrike.name: Shadowstrike
shadowstrike.description: Shadowstrike attacks without warning, blending into any shadow until the moment is perfect.

scenewolf.name: Scenewolf
scenewolf.description: Scenewolf claims to be misunderstood. It has a dramatic flair and is always posing in shadows.

teef.name: Teef
teef.description: Teef is all teeth and attitude. It bites first and never asks questions.

faust.name: Faust
faust.description: Faust made a deal for ultimate power. The terms were not in its favour.

yugure.name: Yugure
yugure.description: Yugure exists in the twilight between day and night. It grows stronger as the sun sets.

zomoo.name: Zomoo
zomoo.description: Zomoo shuffles mindlessly but hits surprisingly hard. Its moo echoes for miles.

cathulu.name: Cathulu
cathulu.description: An ancient cat-god from beyond reality. Cathulu's purring drives opponents to madness.

dauthus.name: Dauthus
dauthus.description: Dauthus is the embodiment of the end. Where it walks, silence follows.

mimpi.name: Mimpi
mimpi.description: Mimpi feeds on dreams. Good dreams make it stronger; nightmares make it wild.

mimple.name: Mimple
mimple.description: Mimple has mastered the architecture of the dream world. It builds labyrinths where foes get lost.

siri.name: Siri
siri.description: Siri knows the answer to every question but only speaks when asked very nicely.

melodee.name: Melodee
melodee.description: Melodee's song can calm any storm or drive any crowd into a frenzy. It chooses wisely.
